intent.user_message: Review the positioning, check recent X signals, decide the safest angle, draft 3 X posts, and save the final decision to Vault.

current_priority.title: Evidence-backed content
current_priority.content: Use public signal as weak evidence and keep Echo inside CMO-approved claim boundaries.

selected_context.title: Activation content objective
selected_context.content: Explain activation as the next growth lever without making unsupported metric claims.

context_pack.recent_session_summary: CMO is exploring a demo-safe content loop.
